name: Political & Regulatory Gatherer
description: Monitors elections, government changes, political instability events, and investment-relevant regulatory developments across all tracked countries.

investor_relevance_thresholds.high: Directly affects capital flows, FDI rules, or property rights
investor_relevance_thresholds.medium: Affects operating environment or political risk premium
investor_relevance_thresholds.low: Background context, no immediate investor impact
